overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk market street with food stalls and vendors, then entering an elevator to access an upper level walkway. The environment features a mix of Asian-inspired market architecture with futuristic holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded cyberpunk market street with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: descends concrete ramp into the lower market area
passing through dense crowd near food preparation stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market street, navigating between food stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind preparation counter with cooking equipment
pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: food stall with green metal canopy and fluorescent lighting serving noodles
large pink neon sign spelling HOTEL on building facade
small blue mobile food cart with yellow neon strip lighting
series of corrugated metal and fabric canopies covering the market street

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow, crowded cyberpunk market street lined with food stalls. Green canopies and neon signs illuminate the concrete walkway as pedestrians navigate the tight space. A food vendor works at a preparation counter while various market stalls display goods under corrugated metal roofs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator access corridor at the end of the market street

events.description: leaving the main market area and approaching the elevator corridor
pressing the elevator call button on the digital panel
metal security gate opens revealing the elevator interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator area, interacting with the control panel, and waiting for the elevator to arrive

notable_agents.action: woman in shiny purple jacket leaning against graffiti-covered concrete wall

entered.detail: folding metal security gate with diamond lattice pattern in teal frame
digital touchscreen panel displaying floor 3 and call elevator interface
wall-mounted vents emitting white steam into the corridor
concrete structural pillar covered in green and black spray paint graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the crowded market and enters a narrower corridor at the street's end, where steam vents and graffiti-covered walls create an industrial atmosphere. A metal security gate blocks the elevator entrance until the call button is pressed, causing the gate to open and reveal the wooden-paneled elevator interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway with concrete stairs and open skylights

events.description: exiting the elevator into the upper level corridor with brighter natural lighting
ascending the wide concrete stairs to the upper market level

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator and walking up the concrete stairs to reach the upper market walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward to upper level
food stall with traditional red paper lanterns hanging from the canopy
natural daylight streaming through large opening in the overhead structure
exposed industrial steel beams and ductwork of the upper building framework

segments.scene_description: After a brief elevator ride, the character emerges into an upper level walkway where natural light filters through openings in the structure. The scene opens to reveal concrete stairs leading upward, flanked by additional market stalls adorned with red paper lanterns, transitioning from the enclosed lower market to a more open, industrial upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dense, neon-lit market street into an elevated industrial walkway. It begins by descending into a crowded thoroughfare lined with green canopies and food stalls, where pedestrians navigate a tight concrete path illuminated by vibrant signage. As the character leaves the bustle of the market, the environment shifts into a narrow, industrial corridor characterized by steam vents and graffiti-covered walls before arriving at a metal security gate. The scene then transitions through the wooden interior of an elevator, which carries the camera upward and away from the enclosed street. Finally, the view opens onto an upper-level walkway where natural light filters through the structure, revealing concrete stairs and stalls adorned with red paper lanterns.
